title: Moderation Summary - April 28, 2026
body:
Moderation actions completed (6 reports reviewed):

BANS (2):
- spam_wave_42: Phishing spam across 6 channels
- toxic_runner: Repeated harassment of newcomers

WARNINGS (1):
- bot_like_user_77: Suspicious automation patterns

CLOSED WITHOUT ACTION (3):
- trusted_helper: Dispute resolved
- new_member_17: Minor formatting issue
- core_maintainer: False positive (brigading report)

All reports now closed.
